metadata.title:
CENTRAL LABOR UNION Or
DERS COMMITTEE TO iNVES-
TIGATE NATURE OF AGREE
MENT AS TO KEEPING HOW.
ARD STREET BRIDGE IN RE-
PAIR.

pages.raw_text:
The Central Labor Union last
night instructed the legislative
committee to ascertain whether or
not the Washington Water Power
company had forfeited its franchise
over the Howard street bridge, by
not having kept it's agreements
with the city to strengthen the
bridge SO it would be safe for cars
and other traffic.


Inquiries at the city hall and an
investigation of the franchises
would appear to show that the local
monopoly is safe and can retain
its grip on the new bridge when
ever the city can get one erected.


There is believed to be little
doubt but that the company could
be refused the use OF the bridge for
a long time to come, but there is
little apparent hope of anything of
this nature being done for every
city official with any real authority
is generally believed to be working
hand in glove with the big COM
